Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Dmitry Shkolnik. Author, maintainer.

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Shkolnik D (2026). griddy: Geospatial Distribution Dynamics for Simple Features. R package version 0.0.0.9000, https://github.com/dshkol/griddy. 

@Manual{,
  title = {{griddy}: Geospatial Distribution Dynamics for Simple Features},
  author = {Dmitry Shkolnik},
  year = {2026},
  note = {R package version 0.0.0.9000},
  url = {https://github.com/dshkol/griddy},
}

Rey, S. J. (2001). Spatial empirics for economic growth and convergence. Geographical Analysis, 33(3), 195-214.

@Article{,
  title = {Spatial empirics for economic growth and convergence},
  author = {Sergio J. Rey},
  journal = {Geographical Analysis},
  year = {2001},
  volume = {33},
  number = {3},
  pages = {195--214},
  doi = {10.1111/j.1538-4632.2001.tb00444.x},
}
